mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND checkout_date > CURDATE() AND status IN ('Reserved', 'IN');

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.room_no, m.member_name, m.member_phone, rm.room_name, rm.image_url, rm.room_view FROM reservations r JOIN members m ON r.member_no = m.member_no JOIN room_master rm ON r.room_no = rm.room_no WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND r.checkout_date > CURDATE();
SELECT total_charge FROM payments WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId} AND pay_status = 'Success';
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET checkout_date = #{newCheckoutDate} WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId};
